vocab.meaning: cảm giác giải phóng về không gian
vocab.example: Watching the city disappear in the rearview mirror gave me a profound sense of spatial liberation as a child.

vocab.meaning: sự kích thích về mặt thị giác
vocab.example: The constant visual stimulation of passing through different provinces kept me glued to the car window for hours.

vocab.meaning: leo/trèo vào xe (thường nói về trẻ em đầy hào hứng)
vocab.example: I would always be the first to clamber into the vehicle whenever my parents announced a weekend getaway.

vocab.meaning: khơi dậy niềm đam mê xê dịch/du lịch
vocab.example: Those early trips across the highlands served to incite a feeling of wanderlust that has stayed with me into adulthood.

vocab.meaning: sự thoải mái về mặt xúc giác
vocab.example: I remember the tactile comfort of the plush upholstery which made even the longest journeys feel cozy.

vocab.meaning: những thay đổi về địa hình
vocab.example: I was fascinated by the topographical changes, observing how the flat plains slowly morphed into rugged mountains.

vocab.meaning: những trò tiêu khiển khi ngồi yên một chỗ
vocab.example: Since there were no iPads back then, I had to rely on sedentary amusement like reading comic books or playing 'I Spy'.

vocab.meaning: tiếng động cơ nổ đều đều
vocab.example: The low, steady hum of the engine was incredibly soothing, often acting as a lullaby during night drives.

vocab.meaning: sự hoài niệm thông qua mùi hương
vocab.example: Whenever I smell old car leather now, it triggers a wave of olfactory nostalgia for our family trips to the seaside.

vocab.meaning: sự quan sát liên tục/không bị gián đoạn
vocab.example: Car travel provided a unique opportunity for uninterrupted observation of the local life along the highways.
